title: Custom Mob Spawns
body:
# Custom Mob Spawn
Simple configurable mob spawning.

Fork of Custom Spawns that support 1.20 and beyond, credits to [b3spectacled](https://github.com/b3spectacled/custom-spawns) for making the mod in the first place.

## How to install (Client and Server)

Simply slide the mod inside your "mods" folder along side [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) and you are good to go.

The mod's config files are located in "config/custom-mob-spawn.json", alternatively if you installed the mod on a client and don't want to go to the config files, you can install [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) and go from there.
